info.text: Not everyone is playing by the same rules in life.

info.text: Even though we are all playing the same game in life, our rewards seem to be different.

info.text: Just like in a game, if wedon't step on someone else's toes, they'll step on us.

info.text: Just like in a game, if we don't step on someone else's toes, they'll step on ours.

info.text: If we want to win, we have to be very careful.

info.text: If you want to win in life, you have to be a crafty player.

info.text: Others may have played better than you in this round, but the game is not over yet.

info.text: In life, be sure to choose a playing board that will cater to your strengths and protect you from your weaknesses.
